title: ITR-2 Required — Foreign Assets or Foreign Income
description: Any resident taxpayer who holds foreign assets (bank accounts, immovable property, equity, trusts) or has signing authority over a foreign account, or has any foreign source income, must file ITR-2 or higher. ITR-1 and ITR-4 are disqualified.

logic.if: taxpayer.has_foreign_assets == true OR taxpayer.has_foreign_income == true OR taxpayer.has_foreign_signing_authority == true
logic.then: itr_form = ITR-1 INVALID, ITR-4 INVALID. Minimum form = ITR-2.
logic.else: Foreign assets disqualifier does not apply.

authority.section: Section 139(1) read with Schedule FA and ITR-2 Instructions
authority.circular: CBDT Circular on Schedule FA disclosure

notes: Schedule FA in ITR-2/3 requires disclosure of all foreign assets held at any time during the financial year, even if no income arose from them.
